request_payload.exposure_text: Remember when we relied on foreign allies for critical supplies during the pandemic? We can't afford that vulnerability again. Strategic autonomy means ensuring our own preparedness - it's about fairness and trust in our own institutions. Many in our community agree: we need to invest in domestic capabilities to protect our civil liberties and security. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
